description:
Join us on Tuesday, June 2, from 4 - 8 PM at Whispering Vine Fourth St. for a Flights & Flatbread tasting featuring Silver Oak and Twomey.

Tasting Fee: $45 per person Includes the flight and one steak, potato, caramelized onion, and lightly blue-cheesed flatbread. Limited to 50 guests.

Featured Wines:

  • Silver Oak Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon
  • Silver Oak Alexander Valley Cabernet Sauvignon
  • Twomey Sauvignon Blanc
  • Twomey Russian River Valley Pinot Noir

Flight and flatbread included.
title: Flights & Flatbread with Silver Oak
